73464441.title: List of Joe Biden 2024 presidential campaign endorsements
73464441.extract: This is a list of notable individuals and organizations who endorsed Joe Biden's 2024 presidential campaign for the Democratic Party nomination. On July 21, 2024, Joe Biden dropped out of the race and endorsed Vice President Kamala Harris's 2024 presidential campaign.
